Name: BOOST_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the particle parameters used for boosting.

Fields.Name: Counter Boost: Particle ID [1]
Fields.Description: SFX 1 to play for counter boost

Fields.Name: Counter Boost: Particle ID [2]
Fields.Description: SFX 2 to play for counter boost

Fields.Name: Counter Boost: Particle ID [3]
Fields.Description: SFX 3 to play for counter boost

Fields.Name: Counter Boost: Dummy Polygon ID [1]
Fields.Description: Dummy Polygon ID to use for playing counter boost SFX 1

Fields.Name: Counter Boost: Dummy Polygon ID [2]
Fields.Description: Dummy Polygon ID to use for playing counter boost SFX 2

Fields.Name: Counter Boost: Dummy Polygon ID [3]
Fields.Description: Dummy Polygon ID to use for playing counter boost SFX 3

Fields.Name: Particle Size Scale
Fields.Description: Sfx size magnification: 1.0 as is, 0.5 to half

Fields.Name: Effective Counter Boost Angle
Fields.Description: The angle range in which counter boost is effective is 90, and it becomes effective when the inner product of the movement direction and dummy poly direction is 0 or more. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Boost Direction Interpolation Rate
Fields.Description: Interpolation rate of booster direction change during normal boost [Rate/Frame]

Fields.Name: Counter Boost Direction Interpolation Rate
Fields.Description: Interpolation rate of booster direction change during counter boost [Rate/Frame]
